mapper.select:
WITH detailselect AS ( SELECT * FROM dy_detail_data WHERE DP_KEYNO =#{keyno} ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 100 ) SELECT * FROM detailselect
WHERE Conn_date >= NOW() - interval 2 day AND Conn_date < NOW() - interval 1 day
GROUP BY DI_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dy_inverter_data ( DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, Vpv1, Ipv1, Vpv2, Ipv2, Vpv3, Ipv3, Vpv4, Ipv4, Vpv5, Ipv5, Vpv6, Ipv6, Vpv7, Ipv7, Vpv8, Ipv8, Vpv9, Ipv9, Vpv10, Ipv10, Vpv11, Ipv11, Vpv12, Ipv12, Vpv13, Ipv13, Vpv14, Ipv14, Vpv15, Ipv15, Vpv16, Ipv16, Vpv17, Ipv17, Vpv18, Ipv18, Vpv19, Ipv19, Vpv20, Ipv20, Vpv21, Ipv21, Vpv22, Ipv22, Vpv23, Ipv23, Vpv24, Ipv24, voltage_of_phase_A_to_B, voltage_of_phase_B_to_C, voltage_of_phase_C_to_A, Phase_voltage_of_phase_A, Phase_voltage_of_phase_B, Phase_voltage_of_phase_C, Current_of_phase_A, Current_of_phase_B, Current_of_phase_C, Active_Power, Grid_Frequency, Internal_temperature, Cumulative_Generation, Daily_Generation, Cabinet_Temperature_2, DSP_Error_Code, DSP_Alarm_Code, PV_String_Fault_Bit, Temperature_Fault_Bit, Slave_DSP_ErrorCode, Slave_DSP_AlarmCode, Total_Generation_Hour, Safety_Code, Work_Mode, Frequency_of_phase_A, Frequency_of_phase_B, Frequency_of_phase_C, Ppv1, Ppv2, Ppv3, Ppv4, Ppv5, Ppv6, Ppv7, Ppv8, Ppv9, Ppv10, Ppv11, Ppv12, Phase, PowerCapacity, RatedLineVoltage, Istr1, Istr2, Istr3, Istr4, Istr5, Istr6, Istr7, Istr8, Istr9, Istr10, Istr11, Istr12, Istr13, Istr14, Istr15, Istr16, Istr17, Istr18, Istr19, Istr20, Istr21, Istr22, Istr23, Istr24, Conn_date ) VALUES ( #{DP_KEYNO}, #{DI_NAME}, #{Vpv1}, #{Ipv1}, #{Vpv2}, #{Ipv2}, #{Vpv3}, #{Ipv3}, #{Vpv4}, #{Ipv4}, #{Vpv5}, #{Ipv5}, #{Vpv6}, #{Ipv6}, #{Vpv7}, #{Ipv7}, #{Vpv8}, #{Ipv8}, #{Vpv9}, #{Ipv9}, #{Vpv10}, #{Ipv10}, #{Vpv11}, #{Ipv11}, #{Vpv12}, #{Ipv12}, #{Vpv13}, #{Ipv13}, #{Vpv14}, #{Ipv14}, #{Vpv15}, #{Ipv15}, #{Vpv16}, #{Ipv16}, #{Vpv17}, #{Ipv17}, #{Vpv18}, #{Ipv18}, #{Vpv19}, #{Ipv19}, #{Vpv20}, #{Ipv20}, #{Vpv21}, #{Ipv21}, #{Vpv22}, #{Ipv22}, #{Vpv23}, #{Ipv23}, #{Vpv24}, #{Ipv24}, #{voltage_of_phase_A_to_B}, #{voltage_of_phase_B_to_C}, #{voltage_of_phase_C_to_A}, #{Phase_voltage_of_phase_A}, #{Phase_voltage_of_phase_B}, #{Phase_voltage_of_phase_C}, #{Current_of_phase_A}, #{Current_of_phase_B}, #{Current_of_phase_C}, #{Active_Power}, #{Grid_Frequency}, #{Internal_temperature}, #{Cumulative_Generation}, #{Daily_Generation}, #{Cabinet_Temperature_2}, #{DSP_Error_Code}, #{DSP_Alarm_Code}, #{PV_String_Fault_Bit}, #{Temperature_Fault_Bit}, #{Slave_DSP_ErrorCode}, #{Slave_DSP_AlarmCode}, #{Total_Generation_Hour}, #{Safety_Code}, #{Work_Mode}, #{Frequency_of_phase_A}, #{Frequency_of_phase_B}, #{Frequency_of_phase_C}, #{Ppv1}, #{Ppv2}, #{Ppv3}, #{Ppv4}, #{Ppv5}, #{Ppv6}, #{Ppv7}, #{Ppv8}, #{Ppv9}, #{Ppv10}, #{Ppv11}, #{Ppv12}, #{Phase}, #{PowerCapacity}, #{RatedLineVoltage}, #{Istr1}, #{Istr2}, #{Istr3}, #{Istr4}, #{Istr5}, #{Istr6}, #{Istr7}, #{Istr8}, #{Istr9}, #{Istr10}, #{Istr11}, #{Istr12}, #{Istr13}, #{Istr14}, #{Istr15}, #{Istr16}, #{Istr17}, #{Istr18}, #{Istr19}, #{Istr20}, #{Istr21}, #{Istr22}, #{Istr23}, #{Istr24}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO dy_inverter_data ( DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, Cumulative_Generation, Daily_Generation, Work_Mode, Conn_date ) VALUES ( #{DP_KEYNO}, #{DI_NAME}, #{Cumulative_Generation}, #{Daily_Generation}, #{Work_Mode}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT Cumulative_Generation, Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dy_inverter_data_main ( DDM_DPP_KEYNO, DDM_P_DATA, DDM_D_DATA, DDM_T_HOUR, DDM_STATUS, DDM_ACTIVE_P, DDM_CUL_DATA, DDM_DATE ) VALUES ( #{DDM_DPP_KEYNO}, #{DDM_P_DATA}, #{DDM_D_DATA}, #{DDM_T_HOUR}, #{DDM_STATUS}, #{DDM_ACTIVE_P}, #{DDM_CUL_DATA}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(C.dpower), 0) as dPower, IFNULL(MAX(C.Total_Generation_Hour), 0) as Total_Generation_Hour FROM ( SELECT sum(Daily_Generation) as dpower, DI_NAME, Conn_date, Total_Generation_Hour FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND DATE_FORMAT(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(now() - interval 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY DI_NAME ) C

SELECT IFNULL(sum(B.Daily_Generation), 0) as today_power, IFNULL(sum(B.Cumulative_generation), 0) as cumulative_power, IFNULL(sum(B.Active_Power), 0) as active_power FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY Conn_date desc LIMIT 100 ) A GROUP BY A.DI_NAME ) B

SELECT A.DI_NAME, A.Active_Power, A.Daily_Generation, A.Cumulative_Generation, A.Work_Mode, A.Vpv1, A.Ipv1, A.Vpv2, A.Ipv2, A.Vpv3, A.Ipv3, A.Vpv4, A.Ipv4, A.Vpv5, A.Ipv5, A.Vpv6, A.Ipv6, A.Vpv7, A.Ipv7, A.Vpv8, A.Ipv8, A.Vpv9, A.Ipv9, A.Vpv10, A.Ipv10, A.Vpv11, A.Ipv11, A.Vpv12, A.Ipv12, A.Vpv13, A.Ipv13, A.Vpv14, A.Ipv14, A.Vpv15, A.Ipv15, A.Vpv16, A.Ipv16, A.Vpv17, A.Ipv17, A.Vpv18, A.Ipv18, A.Vpv19, A.Ipv19, A.Vpv20, A.Ipv20, A.Vpv21, A.Ipv21, A.voltage_of_phase_A_to_B, A.voltage_of_phase_B_to_C, A.voltage_of_phase_C_to_A, A.Phase_voltage_of_phase_A, A.Phase_voltage_of_phase_B, A.Phase_voltage_of_phase_C, A.Current_of_phase_A, A.Current_of_phase_B, A.Current_of_phase_C, A.Grid_Frequency, A.Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DI_NAME, MAX(Conn_date) AS MaxConn FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() GROUP BY DI_NAME ) B ON A.DI_NAME = B.DI_NAME AND A.Conn_date = B.MaxConn WHERE A.DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND DATE(A.Conn_date) = CURDATE() ORDER BY A.DI_NAME
SELECT Cumulative_Generation, Daily_Generation, Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT Cumulative_Generation FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT Daily_Generation FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() AND LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(Work_Mode,''))) = 'normal' ORDER BY Conn_date ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT Cumulative_Generation FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() AND LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(Work_Mode,''))) = 'normal' ORDER BY Conn_date ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT Cumulative_Generation FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} AND DI_NAME = #{DI_NAME} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() ORDER BY Conn_date ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(A.Work_Mode,''))) IN ('fault') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Fault' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(A.Work_Mode,''))) IN ('wait') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Wait' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(A.Work_Mode,''))) IN ('nodata','no data') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'noData' ELSE 'normal' END as work_mode FROM dy_inverter_data A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, MAX(Conn_date) as MaxConn FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME ) B ON A.DP_KEYNO = B.DP_KEYNO AND A.DI_NAME = B.DI_NAME AND A.Conn_date = B.MaxConn WHERE date_format(A.Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
mapper.delete: DELETE t1 FROM dy_inverter_data t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, DATE(Conn_date) as conn_date, MAX(Conn_date) as max_conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} GROUP BY DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, DATE(Conn_date) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) t2 ON t1.DP_KEYNO = t2.DP_KEYNO AND t1.DI_NAME = t2.DI_NAME AND DATE(t1.Conn_date) = t2.conn_date AND t1.Conn_date < t2.max_conn_date

DELETE t1 FROM dy_inverter_data_main t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DDM_DPP_KEYNO, DATE(DDM_DATE) as ddm_date, MAX(DDM_DATE) as max_ddm_date FROM dy_inverter_data_main WHERE DDM_DPP_KEYNO = #{keyno} GROUP BY DDM_DPP_KEYNO, DATE(DDM_DATE) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) t2 ON t1.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = t2.DDM_DPP_KEYNO AND DATE(t1.DDM_DATE) = t2.ddm_date AND t1.DDM_DATE < t2.max_ddm_date
